description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a weathered, rustic appearance, likely used for storing or transporting heavy or valuable items. The box features a flat, plank-style lid secured by two wide wooden slats and several metal latches, suggesting it can be tightly closed. On the front face, there are stenciled markings and a lot number, indicating it may have been used for military or industrial purposes. Both short ends of the box have thick, coiled rope handles, making it easier to lift and carry. The wood grain and metal fittings show signs of age and use, with some discoloration and surface wear. A diamond-shaped label or insignia is visible on the lid, adding to its utilitarian, possibly official character.
description: A weathered wooden storage box with rope handles, metal latches, and stenciled markings, designed for secure storage or transport. The box has a rustic, utilitarian look with visible wood grain and aged metal fittings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stenciled markings, lot number, and central metal latch on the wooden lid.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick rope handle and the box's narrow profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden surface, metal latches, and the diamond-shaped label on the lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another rope handle and visible wood grain, similar to view 1.
attribute_lid_type: removable flat lid with securing slats
attribute_placement_location: floor, garage, warehouse, or storage area
